message:
fix(freeze): Skip freezing multi-arg recursive functions to prevent SIGSEGV

Multi-argument self-recursive functions have a bug in the frozen code
generator where the recursive call isn't properly generated, causing
segfaults. Skip freezing these functions until the codegen is fixed.

Note: tail_recursive benchmark also fails due to qjsc bytecode issue
with deep recursion (hangs at n>9), unrelated to freeze system.
